commands: psql -h datastack-staging-databaseb269d8bb-quozjnaozdbv.cz2ac6quymbd.us-east-2.rds.amazonaws.com -U postgres -d bhcaptureco -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'DownloadEntitlement';"

psql -h datastack-staging-databaseb269d8bb-quozjnaozdbv.cz2ac6quymbd.us-east-2.rds.amazonaws.com -U postgres -d bhcaptureco -c "SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'PurchaseItem' AND column_name = 'createdAt';"
